task_completion.description: Zotero application is open and the library is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window is visible, showing a list of items in the center pane.

task_completion.description: 'Attention Is All You Need' is selected in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot shows the paper 'Attention Is All You Need' highlighted or selected in the center pane of the Zotero window.

task_completion.description: The abstract for 'Attention Is All You Need' is added to the Info pane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane for 'Attention Is All You Need', the 'Abstract' field is populated with text containing keywords like 'Transformer', 'attention mechanism', 'encoder', and 'decoder'.

task_completion.description: 'Generative Adversarial Nets' is selected in the Zotero library.

task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane for 'Generative Adversarial Nets', the 'Abstract' field is populated with text containing keywords like 'adversarial', 'generative model', 'discriminative', and 'minimax'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero GUI to add the abstracts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Zotero application window (clicking, typing, or pasting), rather than using terminal commands to modify the Zotero database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with Zotero, not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The abstract text must be visible inside the Zotero Info pane's 'Abstract' field, not just pasted into a separate text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent pasted the actual abstract text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the Abstract field should resemble a full paragraph, not just a placeholder, a single keyword, or a script snippet.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
To quickly verify the abstracts in the screenshots, look for these keywords in the Zotero Info pane's Abstract field:
- 'Attention Is All You Need': 'Transformer', 'attention mechanism', 'encoder', 'decoder'.
- 'Generative Adversarial Nets': 'adversarial', 'generative model', 'discriminative', 'minimax'.
- 'Deep Learning': 'representations', 'levels of abstraction', 'backpropagation', 'processing layers'.
All abstracts are over 100 characters long.
